title: September 17
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}
'''September 17''' is the 260th day of the year (261st in leap years). There are 105 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1945|1945]] – [[Bruce Spence]] is born.
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Danny Fingeroth]] is born.
*[[1950s#1955|1955]] – [[Charles Martinet]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[James Urbaniak]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Ian Whyte]] is born.
*[[1985]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 102|''Star Wars'' 102]] published.
*[[1997]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 4]] published.
*[[2003]] – Filming for [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Revenge of the Sith'']] finishes.
*[[2008]] – ''[[Star Wars: Luke Skywalker, Last Hope for the Galaxy]]'' published.
*2008 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 33|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 33]] published.
*[[2010]] – "[[Clone Cadets]]" and "[[ARC Troopers (episode)|ARC Troopers]]" air on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2011]] – [[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']] trade edition published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Sutā Wōzu No Norimono 100]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars Galaxy of Adventures: Heroes & Villains]]'' published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Galaxy of Adventures (book)|''Star Wars Galaxy of Adventures'' chapter book]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Star Wars: Thrawn: Alliances (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Thrawn: Alliances'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Boba Fett — Black, White & Red 1|''Boba Fett — Black, White & Red'' 1]] published.
*2025 – [[Star Wars (2025) 5|''Star Wars'' (2025) 5]] published.
<noinclude>
